description_long: This object is a vintage television set with a rectangular, boxy wooden exterior and a slightly slanted top surface. The front features a glass screen displaying a black-and-white image, flanked by a metallic panel on the right side with two large, round control knobs and a small button beneath them. The wood casing has a dark, rich finish, giving it a classic mid-20th-century appearance. The back and sides are plain, with no visible vents or ports, emphasizing the solid, enclosed construction. The television sits on four small, rounded feet, slightly elevating it from the surface. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and straightforward functionality.
description: A vintage, boxy wooden television with a glass screen, metallic control panel, and two large knobs on the front. The exterior is dark wood with a classic, mid-century look.
description_view_0: The left side of the television, showing the dark wooden surface with no visible features or controls.
description_view_1: The front view, displaying the glass screen with a black-and-white image, metallic control panel with two knobs, and a small button.
description_view_2: The right side of the television, similar to the left, with a plain wooden surface and no visible features.
description_view_3: The back of the television, showing a flat, uninterrupted wooden panel with no visible ports or vents.
attribute_bezel_design: thick, dark brown wooden bezel with a matte finish and simple rectangular styling
attribute_control_button_layout: two large round knobs and one small button in a vertical cluster on the right front panel
